questions.text: Do visible form-field labels on the agent's page match the reference's (or 1 if neither render contains a form)?
Does the agent's body copy avoid hallucinating facts that aren't in the reference?
Do numbers, dates, currencies, and special characters on the agent's page match the reference exactly?
Is text rendered inside images on the agent's page the same content as the reference's image text?
Does the agent's body copy preserve the reference's coverage — no obviously missing paragraphs or sentences?
Is the overall text volume on the agent's page comparable to the reference — neither significantly stripped down (much shorter copy, fewer items per list) nor significantly padded (much longer copy)?
Are the visually emphasized words/phrases on the agent's page (the largest text, the boldest text, the most colored text) the same words/phrases the reference visually emphasizes?
